# Generated Codex Output

This file is generated by `skillctl`. Do not edit it directly.

Install into your project or agent workspace:

```bash
cp -R dist/codex/skills /path/to/your-project/skills
```

Layout:

- `skills/<skill-id>/SKILL.md` is the source of truth for workflow and output.
- `skills/<skill-id>/references/` holds code samples and detailed guidance.
- Optional `scripts/` and `assets/` live inside the same skill folder.

Codex and generic agents use skill bundles directly. Cursor and Copilot add thin routing files that point here.

This is the portable skill bundle format. Other vendor outputs are adapters around the same source content.

## Skills

- `ai-assisted-engineering`: Safe and effective use of AI coding agents in engineering workflows.
- `angular-accessibility`: Accessible Angular forms, overlays, keyboard support, and CDK patterns.
- `angular-application-engineering`: Standalone components, services, routing, forms, and maintainable Angular structure.
- `angular-migrate-any-version`: Plan and execute Angular, CLI, and ecosystem version migrations.
- `angular-performance`: Angular change detection, lazy loading, lists, and bundle performance.
- `angular-quality-gates`: Define and enforce Angular CI quality gates — ng build, ESLint, Prettier, strict templates, Karma or Jest tests, and coverage thresholds.
- `angular-rxjs-patterns`: RxJS operators, subscription lifecycle, and stream patterns in Angular.
- `angular-security-hardening`: XSS prevention, sanitization, interceptors, CSRF, and SPA auth hygiene in Angular.
- `angular-state-management`: Signals, services, router state, and NgRx patterns for Angular apps.
- `angular-testing-verification`: Angular TestBed, HTTP testing, and component verification patterns.
- `api-design-review`: Review REST and HTTP API contracts, errors, pagination, versioning, and compatibility.
- `cloud-native-delivery`: Cross-stack delivery architecture for environments, CI/CD, promotion, and platform standards.
- `dotnet-aspnet-service`: Build and review ASP.NET Core APIs, DI, validation, auth, and service tests.
- `dotnet-cloud-native-delivery`: Containerized .NET delivery, CI/CD, and deployment verification.
- `dotnet-core-engineering`: Idiomatic C# engineering, nullable types, async discipline, and maintainability.
- `dotnet-efcore-persistence`: EF Core modeling, queries, migrations, and persistence performance.
- `dotnet-migrate-any-version`: Plan and execute .NET version and toolchain migrations with verification.
- `dotnet-quality-gates`: Define and enforce .NET CI quality gates — dotnet build/test, analyzers, format, nullable reference types, and Coverlet coverage thresholds.
- `dotnet-runtime-diagnostics`: Production debugging for .NET services, memory, threads, and latency.
- `dotnet-security-hardening`: Secure implementation and review patterns for .NET applications.
- `dotnet-testing-verification`: Design, add, review, and improve .NET test coverage and verification.
- `java-21-lts`: Adopt Java 21 LTS features and migrate toolchains safely, including virtual threads, sequenced collections, and pattern matching for switch.
- `java-25-lts`: Adopt Java 25 LTS features and verify toolchain alignment, focusing on finalized language and library capabilities and safe migration from Java 21.
- `java-ai-backend-engineering`: Build Spring Boot AI features with RAG ports, tools, guardrails, and audit.
- `java-cloud-native-delivery`: Containerize and deliver Java services with health probes, JVM tuning, config, and CI/CD.
- `java-concurrency-reliability`: Thread pools, async work, locking, timeouts, and reliability patterns for Java services.
- `java-core-engineering`: Apply modern Java engineering practices for idiomatic implementation, maintainability, correctness, and code review.
- `java-jvm-debugging`: Diagnose JVM runtime behavior, memory, latency, thread, and production performance issues.
- `java-migrate-any-version`: Plan and execute Java version migrations with build, dependency, test, and runtime verification.
- `java-persistence-performance`: Diagnose and improve JPA, Hibernate, JDBC, transactions, N+1 queries, and connection pool performance.
- `java-quality-gates`: Define and enforce Java CI quality gates with Gradle or Maven — tests, Checkstyle, SpotBugs, PMD, JaCoCo, Spotless, and enforcer rules.
- `java-security-hardening`: Secure implementation and review patterns for Java and Spring Boot applications.
- `java-spring-boot-35`: Upgrade to or build on Spring Boot 3.5 (final 3.x line) with Spring Framework 6.2, operational polish, and 3.4-to-3.5 breaking-change awareness.
- `java-spring-boot-40`: Migrate from Spring Boot 3.5 to 4.0 on Spring Framework 7, Jakarta EE 11, Jackson 3, JSpecify nullness, and updated test and security stacks.
- `java-spring-boot-41`: Upgrade to or build on Spring Boot 4.1 with Spring Framework 7.0.8+, Spring Security 7.1, gRPC support, hardened HTTP clients, and observability improvements on a Boot 4.0 baseline.
- `java-spring-boot-service`: Build, review, refactor, and test production-grade Spring Boot services.
- `java-testing-verification`: Design, add, review, and improve Java test coverage and verification.
- `migration-planning`: Plan cross-stack modernizations with sequencing, risk management, and verification.
- `observability-review`: Review logs, metrics, traces, SLOs, dashboards, and alert quality.
- `php-core-engineering`: Apply modern PHP engineering practices for idiomatic implementation, maintainability, correctness, and code review.
- `php-delivery-operations`: Deliver PHP services with containers, runtime tuning, health checks, and CI/CD operations.
- `php-laravel-service`: Build, review, refactor, and test production-grade Laravel services.
- `php-migrate-any-version`: Plan and execute PHP version and toolchain migrations with verification.
- `php-persistence-performance`: Diagnose and improve ORM, query, transaction, and database performance for PHP applications.

- `php-testing-verification`: Design, add, review, and improve PHP test coverage and verification workflows.
- `production-readiness-review`: Review release readiness, operability, rollback, and launch verification.

- `react-accessibility`: Accessible React patterns for forms, keyboard, ARIA, focus, and WCAG-oriented UI.
- `react-ai-product-engineering`: Build React chat and streaming AI UX with citations, safety, and accessibility.
- `react-component-engineering`: Component boundaries, props, composition, state ownership, and maintainable rendering.

- `react-performance`: Diagnose and improve React rendering, bundles, lists, and interaction performance.

- `security-review`: Cross-stack security review for auth, data handling, dependencies, and deployment.
- `software-design-analysis`: Analyze requirements, problem structure, design options, and quality attributes before implementation or architecture review.
- `system-architecture-review`: Review system boundaries, tradeoffs, scalability, operability, and migration risk.
- `technical-documentation-authoring`: Author BRDs, plans, RFCs, ADRs, and technical specs with clear structure, formatting, and documentation best practices.
- `testing-strategy`: Plan test layers, CI quality gates, and risk-based verification across stacks.
- `tool-calling-design-review`: Review agent tool schemas, safety, authorization, idempotency, and observability.
